infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: tryon needs camera access to take a full-body photo of yourself for the AI virtual try-on feature. For example, you can stand in front of a plain wall and take a photo to see how a garment looks on you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: tryon needs access to your photo library so you can select a full-body photo of yourself for the AI virtual try-on feature. For example, you might choose a photo taken in front of a plain wall to get the best results.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: tryon needs access to your photo library to save your AI-generated virtual try-on results so you can view and share them later.

plugins.photosPermission: Photo library access is needed to select your photo.
plugins.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take your photo for the virtual try-on.
